reviews.comment:
Las cuatro estrellas corresponden al servicio de control de funcionamiento del auto, sin cargo que realiza ACA a los socios. La estrella que bajo es por la pésima atención del administrativo que recepcionó y despachó , en el primer piso; ultimo espacio en donde se realiza el test. El más joven de los que atendían allí hoy 23/12 a las 12 hs; recibe la solicitud sin saludar, dando por entendido por parte del cliente cosas que tiene que explicar y tampoco siendo claro, en una actitud displicente y poco educada. Al final, al preguntarle si habían arreglado un detalle de cambio de fusible que solicité y que se había dicho que era posible, me dijo esta persona, y su compañero, que era imposible y que no lo podían hacer , y no me aportaban ninguna solución. Al ir hacia el auto, vi que el técnico que había hecho la revisión estaba cambiando el fusible, y me dijo que era sin cargo porque era casi nada. Obvio que le brindé una propina, que se negó, pero yo insistí, y demostró mayor profesionalismo y dedicación, que el personal administrativo del 1 piso que se nota, no tiene ganas de trabajar

(Translated by Google)
The four stars are for the free vehicle inspection service that ACA provides to its members. The one star I'm deducting is due to the terrible service from the receptionist who received and processed my request on the first floor, the last area where the inspection is performed. The youngest of those working there today, December 23rd, at noon, received my request without greeting me, assuming the customer understood things he needed to explain, and failing to be clear himself, displaying a dismissive and impolite attitude. Finally, when I asked if they had fixed a fuse replacement issue I had requested, which they had been told was possible, this person and his colleague told me it was impossible and they couldn't do it, offering no solution. As I went to the car, I saw the technician who had performed the inspection replacing the fuse, and he told me it was free because it was practically nothing. Of course I offered him a tip, which he refused, but I insisted, and he demonstrated greater professionalism and dedication than the administrative staff on the first floor who clearly don't want to work.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRMnZDdGtBRRAB
